name: troubleshooter
description: Company-specific fault-tree troubleshooting for C134 field issues.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose C134 field issues with structured fault trees.
interface.longDescription: Troubleshooter routes C134 issue packets, Feishu problem documents, logs, videos, CAN traces, and field notes through leader and specialist workflows for Ant, Mantis, scheduler, network, media, and workstation faults.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Troubleshooter to diagnose this C134 issue packet. Separate observed facts, claims, inference, confirmed causes, excluded branches, and missing assets.
